title: Challenge
description: An arena proof-of-work challenge issued by a self-hosted gate, plus the pass token minted on a valid solve. Models documented OPEN PoW mechanisms (anubis/friendlycaptcha/altcha); the gate only ever runs on Kitsune-owned infra and is never a third-party endpoint.

gate.description: PoW family: hashcash (anubis-style SHA-256 leading-zeros), many-small (friendlycaptcha-style N small puzzles), memory-hard (altcha-style Argon2id), cap (PoW fused with a browser-instrumentation probe).

difficulty.description: Work parameter: leading-zero bits (hashcash/many-small) or Argon2 cost (memory-hard).

salt.description: Server-chosen salt/seed binding the puzzle to this issuance.

expires_at.description: UTC end of the validity window.

session_id.description: Edge ks_sid the attempt is bound to — joins the gate verdict to the detector's coherence verdict for the same client.

token.description: The pass token minted on a valid solve; null until solved. Verifiable only by the issuing gate.

cost_ms.description: Solver wall-clock cost in ms — the cost-per-token economics the arena measures.

signature.description: HMAC over the token fields, signed by the issuing gate (single-use).
